steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The critics say the production had the opposite effect from what the playwrights hoped, wearying audiences instead of energizing them. The blank therefore needs a word meaning exciting or energizing.

steps.title: Rule out mismatches
steps.content: Choice A means having many aspects, not energizing. Choice B means true to life, which does not contrast with wearying. Choice D means understated, not stirring. The remaining adjective means exciting. The answer is C.
